content: إوَعى تِنسى تِجيب اللَّبَن مِن عند اللَّبَّان

transcriptions.arabizi: 'iwaAa tinsa tigeeb il-laban min Aand il-labbaen

relationships: eng:make sure that you don't forget to get some milk from the milkman
